title: FMD - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to see how it is displayed on the list and map
scenario: Find My Device list and map in Poly Lens Menu does not update earbud/charge case display and connection status tags correctly after disconnecting and reconnecting individual earbuds
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure both earbuds are connected to the phone.
3. Tap the Poly Lens Menu icon (Find My Device) from the Home screen.
4. Verify the Find My Device list and map display both earbuds (and charge case, if applicable) with a 'Connected' status tag.
5. Disconnect only the right earbud (e.g., place it in the charge case and close the lid, or turn off the earbud).
6. Return to the Find My Device list/map and observe the display for the right earbud.
7. Disconnect both earbuds (e.g., place both in the charge case and close the lid, or turn off both).
8. Return to the Find My Device list/map and observe the display for both earbuds.
9. Reconnect the right earbud (e.g., remove it from the charge case and allow it to pair).
10. Return to the Find My Device list/map and observe the display for the right earbud.
11. Reconnect the left earbud (e.g., remove it from the charge case and allow it to pair).
12. Return to the Find My Device list/map and observe the final display for both earbuds.
expected: Behavior varies by device type: Osprey – shows 3 parts (left earbud, right earbud, charge case) with connection status tags updating per step; Tern/Emu – shows 2 parts (left earbud, right earbud) with connection status tags updating per step; Flamingo – shows 2 parts (left earbud, right earbud) with connection status tags updating per step. After each disconnect/reconnect, the corresponding part's status tag should reflect the current connection state (e.g., 'Connected', 'Disconnected', 'Last Seen').
